---
title: "Feature Exploration"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("notebooks/00_source_project.R")
prepared_path <- "data/prepared/kjv_section_docs.csv"
if(file.exists(prepared_path)){
  section_docs <- readr::read_csv(prepared_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  kjv <- readr::read_csv("data/raw/kjv.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
  section_docs <- prepare_kjv_sections(kjv)
}

docs <- docs_from_table(section_docs)
```

## 1. Build selected feature matrices

```{r build-features}
char3 <- char_tfidf(docs, 3)
char4 <- char_tfidf(docs, 4)
word1 <- ngram_tfidf(docs, 1, stem = FALSE)
stem1 <- ngram_tfidf(docs, 1, stem = TRUE)
fw_kjv <- function_word_freq(docs, default_function_word_sets()$kjv)
punct <- punctuation_features(docs)
sent <- sentence_length_bins(docs)
lex <- lexical_features(docs)
```

## 2. Helper for top features

```{r top-helper}
show_top <- function(mat, doc, k = 15){
  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(k, ncol(mat))]
}

doc <- rownames(char3)[1]
doc
```

## 3. Top features for one document

```{r top-features}
show_top(char3, doc)
show_top(char4, doc)
show_top(word1, doc)
show_top(stem1, doc)
show_top(fw_kjv, doc)
show_top(punct, doc)
show_top(sent, doc)
show_top(lex, doc)
```

## 4. Cosine examples

```{r cosine-examples}
round(cosine_sim(char3), 3)
round(cosine_sim(fw_kjv), 3)
round(cosine_sim(lex), 3)
```
